chapter_title: About Competing in the Deeds for the Hereafter

hadith_entries.text:
254. Narrated Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet
"When the Prophet Job was taking a bath naked, golden
locusts began to fall on him. Job started collecting them in his
clothes. His Lord addressed him: "O Job! Haven't I given you
enough so that you are not in need of them?" Job replied:
"Yes! By Your Honor (Power)! But I cannot dispense with
Your Blessings." (Bukhari)
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
